=== PROJECT ===
ResumeGPT
AI‑Driven Resume Assistant
Java, Spring Boot, OpenAI API
GitHub: https://github.com/jchatham/resumeGPT
Live Demo: https://resumegpt-fudfcxbjbxcegvbk.canadacentral-01.azurewebsites.net/
- Developed an LLM-powered RAG system enabling conversational querying of resumes, combining semantic search with GPT‑based generation for context-aware responses.
- Implemented embedding-based indexing to efficiently retrieve relevant resume content, reducing redundant API calls and improving response relevance.
- Built robust Spring Boot REST APIs to handle resume ingestion, vector storage, and LLM query orchestration.
